channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Beyond Lovable and Mistral: 21 European startups to watch
item.description: It is not that European startups never get attention — Lovable and Mistral AI are proof of that. But there are many more that insiders are tracking.

item.title: The Nacon RIG R8 Spectre Pro HS proves that headsets can still be great value in 2026
item.description: A wireless, base station model with similarities to Nacon’s existing R5 that impresses with tight, distinctive, low-distortion audio.

item.title: How to watch Miami Grand Prix 2026 F1: Live Stream, Preview, Schedule
item.description: All the ways to watch Miami Grand Prix 2026 live streams online and from anywhere, as Mercedes look to continue their winning start to the 2026 F1 season.

item.title: OnePlus is reportedly merging with Realme and 'evaluating' its future — but I'm convinced that this is fantastic news for Android fans
item.description: It's all doom and gloom in the Android world, with reports of OnePlus' imminent demise swirling — but looking forward, this could actually be a great development.

item.title: Google's $3 USB stick for revamping old laptops with ChromeOS Flex has sold out — and proves I was right about Chromebooks
item.description: There's a new option for giving new life to an aging computer, and it's apparently as popular as it should be.

item.title: Meta acquires robotics AI startup as it makes the push into humanoid machines
item.description: The company has purchased Assured Robot Intelligence, whose staff is joining Meta's Superintelligence Labs.

item.title: Notre test du Motorola Edge 70 Fusion : un beau smartphone équilibré, mais pas foudroyant
item.description: Le Motorola Edge 70 Fusion vise le très concurrentiel segment du moyen de gamme. La marque mise ici sur un design travaillé, toujours avec la touche Pantone, et une fiche technique aussi équilibrée que sa conception est robuste. Mais est-ce suffisant pour faire de l’ombre aux ténors du moment ?

item.title: Anker’s discounted 2-in-1 USB-C cable is a great way to spend $15
item.description: I’ll never stop gushing about 2-in-1 USB-C cables. They’re really nice to have because, at this point, I’ve amassed so many devices that charge via USB-C. It’s also common for more than one to need to be recharged at a time, which is where they come in handy. I can charge my Nintendo Switch 2 […]

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for May 2, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: Tovala Family Meals Review: Good Food, Lots of Salt
item.description: Tovala is a meal kit that comes with a smart oven, or a smart oven that comes with a meal kit. New family meals make it much more useful. But lord, the sodium.

item.title: 8 new 4K Blu-rays from April 2026 to add to your collection
item.description: April has been another great month for 4K Blu-rays, and I'm looking at 8 discs that could make a fine addition to your collection.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for May 2, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: Que valent les deux nouvelles offres fibre Sosh si on les confronte l’une contre l’autre : le versus Sosh Boost Fibre vs La Boîte Sosh Fibre
item.description: Sosh propose deux nouvelles offres fibre sans engagement, avec deux philosophies radicalement différentes. Laquelle est vraiment faite pour vous ?

item.title: L’Airbus A400M va pouvoir larguer 50 drones ou 12 missiles en plein vol : la transformation se confirme
item.description: Un module amovible permettant de larguer jusqu'à 50 drones ou 12 missiles de croisière depuis la soute de l'A400M Atlas est en développement. L'avion de transport militaire européen confirme sa polyvalence.

item.title: Film fans, assemble! Vote in TechRadar's blockbuster movie season poll to tell us which one you're most excited to see in mid-2026
item.description: Blockbuster movie season is almost here — and we need your help to pick a winner in our 'most anticipated new film' survey.

item.title: Obsessed with Tomodachi Life? You need a Nintendo Switch stylus — here are our top picks for getting creative with your Miis
item.description: Get the most out this unhinged Japanese game's many creative features.

item.title: “The more experienced listeners are, the less bass-heavy they want the sound”: JBL is changing the way its flagship headphones sound, and I've heard the difference — here’s how I rate it
item.description: The JBL Tour One M3 just got a major update with a new sound at the fore — I spoke with JBL about the changes, and heard them for myself.
